title: Delhi court orders OpIndia to remove articles against journalist Swati Chaturvedi
description: A Delhi court recently ordered OpIndia to remove two allegedly defamatory articles published on its website about journalist Swati Chaturvedi. District Judge Meenu Kaushik of the Patiala House Court passed an interim order directing the removal of articles titled ‘Swati Chaturvedi may be delusional-Sources’ and ‘The Wire and its Star Journalist peddles another absurd lie about the RSS, and it is not for the first time’, after Chaturvedi filed a defamation case.The Court also restrained OpIn
